name: codex-background-studio
description: A reversible background manager for the Codex Windows desktop app.
author: Codex Background Studio contributors

legacyElectronScripts._comment: Electron 版本已在 0.4.0 废弃；这些命令仅作历史记录，不再由 npm scripts 执行。
legacyElectronScripts.dev:electron: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json -w --preserveWatchOutput" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
legacyElectronScripts.build:electron: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist-electron',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && npm run build:web
